ipc_charges: 2 charges related to Assault or use of criminal force to deter public servant from discharge of his duty. (BNS Section-132)
1 charges related to Punishment for Rioting (BNS Section-191(2))
1 charges related to Punishment for Criminal intimidation. (BNS Section-351(2))
2 charges related to Punishment for Being member of an unlawful assembly (IPC Section-143)
2 charges related to Punishment for wrongful restraint (IPC Section-341)
1 charges related to Punishment for Rioting (IPC Section-147)
1 charges related to Knowingly joining or continuing in assembly of five or more persons after it has been commanded to disperse (IPC Section-151)
6 charges related to Wrongfully restraining any person. (BNS Section-126(2))
6 charges related to Being member of an unlawful assembly. (BNS Section-189(2))
1 charges related to Every member of unlawful assembly guilty of offence committed in prosecution of common object. (BNS Section-190)
